cards.title: MBZUAI and AI for sustainability
cards.body: MBZUAI frames artificial intelligence as a tool for solving real-world problems and advancing sustainable progress. Its research ecosystem spans areas that matter for public good, including agriculture, digital public health, and responsible AI applications.

cards.title: ALA and African society
cards.body: African Leadership Academy develops young leaders from across Africa and grounds the bootcamp in values of curiosity, integrity, service, and practical leadership for the communities participants come from.
